---
title: "Course Lectures"
---


# Lecture Slides

This section contains the lecture slides for the Scientific Computing mini-course.


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
## 0. Environment Setup

Introduction to the course environment and tools.

[Open Slides](lectures/day1_setup.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## 1. Introduction

General Motivation, Complex Systems, and Course Structure

[Open Slides](lectures/L01_intro.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## 2. N-D Arrays

Introduction to Multidimensional Arrays

[Open Slides](lectures/L02_nd_arrays.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## 3. Massive Data

Handling large-scale datasets and efficient workflows.

[Open Slides](lectures/L03_massive_data.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## 4. Computer simulations

Introduction to computational simulations: 

[Open Slides](lectures/L04_simulations.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## 5. Epidemic Models

Compartmental and metapopulation epidemic models.

[Open Slides](lectures/L05_epidemic_models.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## 6. Parallel Computing

Brief Introduction to Parallel Computing

[Open Slides](lectures/L06_intro_parallel_computing.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## 7. Evolutionary Algorithms

Optimization and evolutionary strategies.

[Open Slides](lectures/L07_evolutionary_algorithms.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## 8. Extreme-scale model exploration

Large-scale model exploration workflows.

[Open Slides](lectures/L08_emews.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

:::
